narration_lines: 下午，幼儿园的孩子们在操场上做游戏。老师带着大家玩老鹰捉小鸡。
予予站在队伍最后面，没有参与游戏。他的目光越过操场铁栅栏，看着远处马路对面——陆氏大厦的楼顶在阳光下闪着光。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot with child and teacher in background play; no dialogue or props.

narration_lines: 旁边一个小男孩跑过来拉他。
shots.reasoning_brief: Boy approaches and speaks to Shen Zhiyu; action of pulling implied but not prop-related.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我有一个很重要的事要做。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child responds seriously, shaking head; listener is the boy from previous.
Boy questions child; direct follow-up.
Child whispers response; listener boy.

narration_lines: 保安伸手去拦——他灵巧地从保安腿边溜了过去。
shots.reasoning_brief: Security speaks to child as he slips past; action on child but no prop.

narration_lines: 予予已经冲进了电梯。一个西装男人正好在等电梯，他跟了进去。
shots.reasoning_brief: Businessman looks down and asks child in elevator.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 找我爸爸。他在最高的地方。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child responds seriously to businessman.

narration_lines: 陆景琛坐在主位上，一只手搭在桌面上，另一只手翻着报告。赵一鸣站在他身后。
shots.reasoning_brief: Scene shift to meeting room; Lu and assistant visible, report prop but no handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_DEPARTMENT_MANAGER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……第三季度的营收同比增长了12%，主要得益于——

narration_lines: 他正在听一个部门经理汇报。
shots.reasoning_brief: Manager reports to Lu; report continues from previous shot in same scene.

narration_lines: 会议室鸦雀无声。所有人都愣住了。
shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant reacts first and approaches child; scene change, no prop inheritance.

narration_lines: 沈知予（没有理赵一鸣，迈着小短腿径直走向会议桌）。
他走到陆景琛面前，仰着头看他。桌面的高度刚好到他胸口。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only: child walks to Lu, ignores assistant.

narration_lines: 予予深吸一口气，像是在酝酿什么大事。
shots.reasoning_brief: Child asks Lu directly; clear addressee.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这是我画的我们一家三口的画。你看，中间这个黑色的就是我爸爸。因为我还不知道他长什么样。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child pulls out drawing and explains to Lu; no prior prop.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 但是！今天我在学校看到你的照片了。妈咪带我去医院那天也见过你。我觉得——你就是那个黑色的人。

narration_lines: 他歪了歪头。
shots.reasoning_brief: Child continues explanation to Lu; photo mentioned but not physical prop handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆叔叔，你是不是我爸爸？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child directly asks Lu if he is father.

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: 他伸出手，把那张画接了过来。

narration_lines: 长达五秒的沉默。
然后——陆景琛做了一件所有人都没有预料到的事。
他伸出手，把那张画接了过来。
他的手指微微收紧，捏着那张有些皱巴巴的画纸。
shots.reasoning_brief: Lu takes and comments on painting quietly to child; handoff inferred from context, prop_id assigned as not in previous but evident.

narration_lines: 予予眨了眨眼，忽然笑了。
shots.reasoning_brief: Child smiles and asks Lu for confirmation.

narration_lines: 陆景琛没回答。他站起来，对会议室里所有人说了一句——
高管们面面相觑，但没人敢多问。纷纷起身离开。
shots.reasoning_brief: Lu ends meeting to everyone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆总……要不要通知沈小姐——

narration_lines: 会议室只剩下三个人——陆景琛，赵一鸣，和一个四岁半的小男孩。
shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant whispers to Lu about notifying mother.
Lu interrupts assistant, looking at child; action references child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我自己坐电梯上来的！68楼是最高！我知道我爸爸一定在最高的地方！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child explains to Lu, raising hand.
Lu orders meal for assistant; prop meal not yet present.
Assistant surprised response to Lu.

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: 把那张画放在桌上，面朝自己

shots.reasoning_brief: Lu explains to assistant about child, places painting; continues from prior handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 叔叔，你果然是我爸爸。你看，你第一次见我就请我吃饭。我同学说，爸爸就是会请小孩吃饭的人。

narration_lines: 予予爬上了会议室旁边的沙发，两条小短腿晃啊晃。
shots.reasoning_brief: Child sighs and concludes to Lu.

music_cues: 钢琴轻起，温暖如阳光穿透阴云
narration_lines: 陆景琛看着那双眼睛，什么都没说。
（全景）沈念歌在幼儿园门口急得团团转。老师也慌了——予予不见了。
shots.reasoning_brief: Transition shot with music; Lu looks at child, cut to mother and teacher panicking; narration explicit.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 你们怎么看的孩子？他才四岁——

shots.reasoning_brief: Scene shift to kindergarten; mother accuses teacher.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 对不起沈女士，他趁做游戏的时候从侧门溜出去的——

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher apologizes to mother.

narration_lines: 沈念歌的手机响了。一个陌生号码。
接起来
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother answers phone to assistant.

narration_lines: （近景）沈念歌的脸色变了。
不是担心——是恐惧。
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother fearful response on phone.

music_cues: 大提琴低音，紧迫感升起
narration_lines: 就像四年前，她赤脚走过那条走廊。
不快。但一步都没有退。
她转身，朝陆氏大厦的方向走去。
步伐不快，但很稳。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only ending with mother walking resolutely; music cue; scene change.
